There is more dialogue than puzzles, and the game is not very long, but it is completely free, and the puzzles make you think a little bit before solving them. Other than an Ad pop up at the beginning of each chapter, there are no ad interruptions. If you do leave out of the game, you do start over at the beginning of the chapter that you were last on, so when you need to quit mid game, just finish the chapter you're on before closing the app and then you'll start at the beginning of the next chapter when you return. I do recommend checking this one out and I hope to see more games by this Dev.
